    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Interface IConvertibleCurve<T>

    Defines methods that convert the current curve to a Step, Linear or Spline curve.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Animations
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public interface IConvertibleCurve<T>
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    T

    The type of a point of the curve

    Properties

    Name Description
    MaxDegree

    Gets a value indicating the maximum degree of the curve, current values are: 0: STEP. 1: LINEAR. 3: CUBIC.

    Methods

    Name Description
    Clone()

    Creates a clone of this curve.
    ToLinearCurve()

    Gets a LINEAR interpolated curve. Use only when MaxDegree is 1.
    ToSplineCurve()

    Gets a CUBIC interpolated curve. Use only when MaxDegree is 3.
    ToStepCurve()

    Gets a STEP interpolated curve. Use only when MaxDegree is 0.
    In This Article
